title: Police employees, persons ineligible
doc_html:
§1397.  Police employees, persons ineligible

No individual shall be eligible to become a state police officer who is a member of an organization which advocates the violation of the laws of the United States of America and/or the State of Louisiana.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 297, §1.
